pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11 to ensure the project compiles with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 8 language features, potentially missing Java 11 specific optimizations or failing if Java 8 toolchains are unavailable, and it does not reflect the target runtime environment.
